purpose: Run a fresh, dense, six-update replication of the V11 celebration recipe with four treatment seeds and four exactly seed-matched sign-flip controls.

scientific_status.reason: The motivating seed195 curve and V11/V12/V13 outcomes were public before this registration, the V13 outcome informed the disclosed choice to retain positive celebration as treatment, and dense intermediate validation is an explicit new descriptive addition.

v13_public_outcome_known_before_v14_regi.selection_timing: V13 app ap-AffsuHrmJkl2drAttKYaZ0 stopped at 2026-07-14T23:48:15Z; this final V14 registration was refrozen at 2026-07-15T00:34:20Z after the complete public curves and the outcome-free V14 preclaim failure were available, but before any V14 GPU dispatch, W&B run, or outcome.
v13_public_outcome_known_before_v14_regi.selection_rationale: Retain positive celebration as the V14 treatment despite the V13 signflip mean's monotonicity: the negative-minus-positive terminal effect was positive for only one of four matched seeds, while the positive recipe produced an aggregate step-4 rise in each fresh V11, V12, and V13 treatment cohort. Continue to run the exact signflip as the matched control and classify all V14 inference as adaptive development evidence.

candidate.control_difference_from_treatment: Only the two component-weight signs change; seed, data selection, optimizer, model, calibration, target words, horizon, and evaluation schedule are matched.

observational_evaluation.dense_addition_relative_to_v11: Steps 1,2,3 are additional exposed descriptive nodes; the fixed V11 shape gate remains steps 0,4,5,6.

v11_shape_gate.criterion: M4 > M0, M5 >= M4, and M6 >= M5 on the four-treatment-seed mean

primary_development_test.success: all four effects strictly positive with no ties and positive mean

secondary_development_test.success: all four effects strictly positive with no ties and positive mean

report_regardless_of_result: condition means and sample standard errors
predeclared_analysis.multiplicity_caveat: These are nominal tests in an adaptively selected development program and are not corrected across earlier candidates, seeds, horizons, or visible outcomes.

corrected_terminal_verifier.authoritative_curve: validation_history.jsonl must contain exactly steps 0,1,2,3,4,5,6 in order.
corrected_terminal_verifier.trainer_validation_rows: log_history.json must contain exactly callback-emitted post-training validation steps 1,2,3,4,5,6; the pre-train step-0 baseline is intentionally absent.
corrected_terminal_verifier.learning_rate_rule: A reward-bearing row may omit learning_rate only when it is validation-merged. Whenever present it must be finite and equal 3e-6 within absolute tolerance 1e-15; every non-validation reward row must contain it.
corrected_terminal_verifier.reward_rule: Exactly one named J-lens reward is present at every optimizer step and no correctness or GSM8K reward metric appears.
corrected_terminal_verifier.duplicate_reward_std_rule: The generic reward_std and the same J-lens reward's named std are independently reduced float32 summaries. They must be nonnegative and within four binary32 ULPs; this accepts the observed valid two-ULP reduction-order difference while still rejecting material disagreement.
corrected_terminal_verifier.collector_rule: All eight spawned calls are drained and every success or exception is recorded before an aggregate failure is raised.

tracking.canonical_x_axis: train/global_step for training runs; global_step for aggregate run

execution.capacity_policy: All eight fixed calls are spawned without outcome conditioning; at most four GPU workers run concurrently, so the remaining calls queue for a second wave.
execution.post_preclaim_user_capacity_change: After attempt A failed before claim or GPU dispatch, the user lowered every new-launch ceiling from eight to four. The actual GPU launch therefore uses max_containers=4 without changing any science, seed, analysis, or W&B identity.

firewall.inference_exclusion: No V14 row, model, aggregate, p-value, or checkpoint may alter or enter any closed V11/V12/V13 decision or protected-final analysis.
